channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘The Mummy 4’ Is Getting the Family Back Together
item.description: It ain't just Fraser and Weisz: John Hannah's also back in the franchise game with 'The Mummy 4.'

item.title: JD Vance Says UFOs Are Actually Demons
item.description: "I think that one of the Devil's great tricks is to convince people he never existed."

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
item.description: Estimates for total Claude consumer users are all over the map (we've seen figures ranging from 18 million to 30 million). Anthropic hasn't disclosed this data, but a spokesperson did tell TechCrunch that Claude paid subscriptions have more than doubled this year.

item.title: En promo, quelle est la meilleure affaire entre le nouveau Nothing Phone (4a) Pro et le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro+ ?
item.description: À moins de 450 euros, le milieu de gamme n’a jamais été aussi disputé. Entre le très original Nothing Phone (4a) Pro et le solide Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro Plus 5G, deux smartphones notés 8/10 par Frandroid, le choix devient presque difficile, surtout quand les deux sont en promotion.

item.title: TikTok’s policy for AI ads isn’t working
item.description: I've been struggling to tell whether the ads appearing in my TikTok feeds have been made with generative AI tools. As someone who spends a great deal of time scrutinizing images and videos for the usual "tells" that something was synthetically generated, some of the promotions I've seen have definitely sparked suspicion. For several weeks, […]

item.title: Meta’s legal defeat could be a victory for children, or a loss for everyone
item.description: Is social media not just bad, but illegally bad? Should tech companies pay for making it that way? According to two US juries - and no shortage of outside commentary - the answer to both questions is "yes." Earlier this week, two juries - one in New Mexico, one in Los Angeles - held Meta […]

item.title: 6 new 4K Blu-rays from March 2026 to add to your collection
item.description: For this month's Blu-ray Bounty, I'm checking out 6 discs released in March that would be great additions to any 4K collection.

item.title: What will power the grid in 2035? The race is wide open
item.description: Fusion, fission, and even natural gas are appeared tied in the race to deliver new power to the grid in the early 2030s.

item.title: The First Proper ‘Ghost in the Shell’ Trailer Is a ’90s Anime Fever Dream
item.description: Science Saru finally showed off real footage for 'The Ghost in the Shell,' and it looks beautiful in motion as it does in stills.

item.title: A classic Zelda-style adventure, but a lot more cozy
item.description: The Legend of Zelda games are grand adventures, but they can also be very comforting, with quaint villages to explore and warm landscapes to take in. Under The Island takes that idea a step further. It still offers the sense of exploration and puzzle-solving that makes Zelda games so satisfying, but it also takes place […]

item.title: Here’s what Verge readers are buying during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: We have a pretty good understanding of which deals Verge readers will gravitate toward. After all, what products and services resonate with our audience — and the quality of the deal itself — are what help us determine what to cover on any given day. And yet, we never know for sure how people will […]

item.title: Let’s take a look at the retro tech making a comeback
item.description: Boomboxes, instant cameras, and even landlines are making a comeback. Here are the coolest retro-inspired devices available.

item.title: Wonder Man season 2: everything we know so far about the Marvel TV show's return on Disney+
item.description: Wonder Man season 2 is in the works at Marvel Studios — here's what we know about it so far.

item.title: J’ai testé le VELLO DE VILLE Loady, le vélo cargo électrique le plus personnalisable du marché
item.description: VELO DE VILLE fête ses 60 ans cette année. Sa force : la personnalisation de ses modèles, du choix du moteur au choix de la couleur en passant par la selle et les freins. Avec le LOADY, VELO DE VILLE signe son entrée sur le marché très concurrentiel du vélo cargo. Que vaut ce LOADY face à la concurrence ? La réponse dans ce test complet.

item.title: The best drone deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale — DJI drones are hitting best-ever prices
item.description: Shop the best drone deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save on DJI, Skyrover, and more.

item.title: Dreame Matrix10 Ultra : ce robot aspirateur-laveur qui change lui-même ses serpillières voit son prix passer sous les 1 100 €
item.description: Avec ses patins interchangeables, sa grande puissance et sa navigation intelligente, le Dreame Matrix10 Ultra ne manque clairement pas d'atouts. En ce moment, Boulanger le propose à 1 079 euros au lieu de 1 299 euros.

item.title: Im a tech editor. I found 45+ Amazon Big Spring Sale tech deals Id actually buy.
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.
